passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: A discount code will be emailed to you. This pass allows 50% off the ticket price for up to 4 people and does not have to be used on the date selected in the Library's pass system.
source_phrases: A discount code will be emailed to you. This pass allows 50% off the ticket price for up to 4 people and does not have to be used on the date selected in the Library's pass system.

passes.title: Charles River Museum Of Industry And Innovation
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person. Any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.
*This is an e-pass which will be emailed to you and must be used on the selected date.*
The Discovery Museum offers free admission for all on the first Friday of each month, October to June from 4:30 to 8:00pm.

*This is an e-pass which will be emailed to you and must be used on the selected date.*

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text:
This pass is good for:
Daytime Mansion Tour admission for two adults at $5 per person, and two children free
One Take-a-Walk bag rental at $2/hr
Story Time for two children at $5 per child, and an accompanying adult free
For available dates and times, please visit goreplace.org/whats-on

passes.title: Gore Place
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 visitors at 50% off regular museum admission rates. Discount may not be combined with other offers. 
*This is a physical, coupon pass which must be picked up at the Ground Floor Circulation Desk. This pass has an expiration date and does NOT need to be used on the date you've selected in our calendar.*

*This is a physical, coupon pass which must be picked up at the Ground Floor Circulation Desk. This pass has an expiration date and does NOT need to be used on the date you've selected in our calendar.*

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text:
Free admission for up to 2 adults and their children or grandchildren (under 18) to one Historic New England site. 
*This is a physical, coupon pass which must be picked up at the Ground Floor Circulation Desk. This pass has an expiration date and does NOT need to be used on the date you've selected in our calendar.*

*This is a physical, coupon pass which must be picked up at the Ground Floor Circulation Desk. This pass has an expiration date and does NOT need to be used on the date you've selected in our calendar.*

passes.title: Historic New England
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 people at $5.00 each. Children under 18 are free.
This pass is flexible and does not need to be used on the date it is reserved
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people at $5.00 each. Children under 18 are free.
This pass is flexible and does not need to be used on the date it is reserved

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2 per visitor over the age of 2. Please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/wildlife-sanctuaries/trails for the latest information, including safety guidelines.
Please Note: Drumlin Farms is only open on Mondays when it is a holiday. Otherwise you can visit Tuesday-Sunday.
source_phrases: This one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2 per visitor over the age of 2. Please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/wildlife-sanctuaries/trails for the latest information, including safety guidelines.
Please Note: Drumlin Farms is only open on Mondays when it is a holiday. Otherwise you can visit Tuesday-Sunday.

passes.title: Mass Audubon Drumlin Farm
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows one vehicle to park for free at any MA State Parks. 
*This is a paper parking pass which must be picked up at the Ground Floor Circulation Desk and used on the date selected. The pass can be picked up on the day of or day before use and must be returned by the day following use.*
source_phrases: This pass allows one vehicle to park for free at any MA State Parks.

*This is a paper parking pass which must be picked up at the Ground Floor Circulation Desk and used on the date selected. The pass can be picked up on the day of or day before use and must be returned by the day following use.*

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
For visit dates beginning January 20, 2026, each promo code may be redeemed for up to 2 adult tickets for $15 each and 4 youth tickets for $10 each. Promo codes are redeemable online, over the phone, or at any MFA ticket desk. Passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any other public programs. All prices are subject to change. Discount admission may not be combined with other offers. When planning your visit, please check www.mfa.org/visit for current Museum hours and early closings. The Museum is closed on New Year’s Day, Patriots’ Day, Independence Day, Thanksgiving Day, and Christmas Day."
*This is an e-pass which will be emailed to you and must be used on the selected date.*

Passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any other public programs. All prices are subject to change. Discount admission may not be combined with other offers. When planning your visit, please check www.mfa.org/visit for current Museum hours and early closings. The Museum is closed on New Year’s Day, Patriots’ Day, Independence Day, Thanksgiving Day, and Christmas Day."

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
*This is an e-pass which will be emailed to you and must be used on the selected date.*
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
*This is an e-pass which will be emailed to you and must be used on the selected date.*
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium for up to 4 people. Only applies to adult and child pricing.
*This is an e-pass which will be emailed to you and must be used on the selected date.*

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows up to 6 people to visit at $9 per adult and $6 per child. Children under 2 are free. Library coupons are not valid for admission to the evening "Boston Lights" exhibition.
*This is a physical, coupon pass which must be picked up at the Ground Floor Circulation Desk. This pass has an expiration date and does NOT need to be used on the date you've selected in our calendar.*
